summary: Created full Airtable schema for The Vibe Pill Community base (app4RseEJNYVUnH28). Created 'Community Members v2' table with all 13 fields (Name, Email, Phone, Membership Status, Tier, Stripe Customer ID, Stripe Subscription ID, Joined Date, Total Calls, Last Call Date, Screening Notes, Source, Notes). Created 'Calls' table with 9 fields for VAPI call tracking. Created 'Applications' table with 10 fields for membership application lifecycle. NOTE: The Airtable OAuth integration's create-field and update-table Meta API endpoints return 404, so the original Community Members table (tblP4vacxxgnTX26A) could not be modified in-place. A new table 'Community Members v2' (tblgEHq5Rk3C8SAA2) was created with the full schema instead. The old table should be renamed/deleted manually. All other drops should use tblgEHq5Rk3C8SAA2 as the Community Members table.

notes: The Airtable OAuth integration (Pipedream) does not support the Meta API write endpoints (create-field, update-table return 404). Workaround: created 'Community Members v2' (tblgEHq5Rk3C8SAA2) as a new table with the complete schema. The original tblP4vacxxgnTX26A ('Community Members') is empty and should be deleted or renamed manually. V should also rename 'Community Members v2' to 'Community Members' in the Airtable UI. All downstream drops should reference tblgEHq5Rk3C8SAA2.
